title: La Bestia — agent frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of every agent file under config/agents/. Body conventions are enforced separately via lints (see ARCHITECTURE.md §3.1).

description.description: Used by the routing layer; should start with 'Use PROACTIVELY for' or similar imperative

tools.description: Closed enum. Adding a new tool here requires a CHANGELOG entry.

model.description: Pinned model id. Aliases (opus/sonnet/haiku) are accepted for ergonomics.
